score_fields.name: formal_validity_score
score_fields.description: Overall defensibility of the Lean artifact as formal work.

score_fields.name: external_admissibility_score
score_fields.description: Likelihood that an external Lean maintainer or reviewer would consider the artifact legitimate and appropriate.

score_fields.name: proof_correctness_score
score_fields.description: Whether the proof structure appears to support the stated theorem rather than only looking proof-shaped.

score_fields.name: theorem_statement_fidelity_score
score_fields.description: Whether the Lean theorem statement matches the natural-language claim or cited source.

score_fields.name: source_fidelity_score
score_fields.description: Whether the grounding faithfully supports the theorem and proof choices.

score_fields.name: math_explanation_quality_score
score_fields.description: Whether the README explains the theorem and proof idea in mathematically honest language.

score_fields.name: reviewer_rejection_risk_score
score_fields.description: Higher means higher risk of external rejection.
